rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 6/10 and rest on the same three substantive concerns (no Python, AI experience too recent for the 8+ year requirement, no vector DB/RAG/pipeline experience) and the same strengths (Staff-level craftsmanship, TypeScript/AWS, agentic/AI-agent infrastructure work). The textual differences are mere rewording and the surfacing of resume details already present (MCP), none of which key off the Berlin→Bangalore location change. Location carries no job-relevant signal, and nothing in the variant penalizes or shifts reasoning based on it.
